texto: A certain amount of opposition is a great help to a man it is what he wants and must have to be good for anything. Hardship and opposition are the native soil of manhood and self-reliance.
explicacao: Orientação direta de John Neal sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “A certain amount of opposition is a great help to a man it is what he wants and must have to be g…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, adversity, opposition, útil em momentos de reflexao.
